---
title: "Work"
pagetitle: "Work"
description: "Case studies. Methodology-forward writeups of public research artifacts: forward simulators, citation graphs, reproducible pipelines, and the validators that gate them."
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - path: ../rtsd/
      title: "rtSD Explorer"
      description: "A deterministic forward-simulator for the MEDv4 fitness-fatigue-signal ODE, with a seven-test physiological-plausibility validator that gates the model. Runs in-browser via marimo + Pyodide."
      image: ../img/rtsd-rm1-dose-response.png
      image-alt: "Reference-mode RM1: a doubled training dose produces roughly twice the fitness-gain rate over 52 weeks."
      date: "2026-05-28"
      categories: [sport science, system dynamics, fitness–fatigue model, ODEs, interactive]
    - path: ../citation-network/
      title: "The Banister Constellation"
      description: "175 papers across 50 years of fitness-fatigue model literature, anchored on Banister 1975. Browser-rendered interactive citation graph via vis-network."
      image: ../img/banister-constellation-hero.png
      image-alt: "Citation-network constellation of 175 fitness-fatigue-model papers anchored on Banister 1975."
      date: "2026-05-21"
      categories: [sport science, fitness–fatigue model, citation network, scientometrics, interactive]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
  image-height: 220px
  grid-columns: 2
  max-description-length: 250
  feed: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
---

A curated set of methodology-forward case studies. Most projects sit upstream as private working code; what reaches this page is the writeup-grade subset where the underlying repo is public, the artifact is testable, and the story is far enough along to defend.

Each case study links to the source repository and, where applicable, a live demo. The narrower the deliverable, the more it gets discussed here.
